inputs.client_data: Client: DataFlow Analytics. Contract started 2026-01-15. Deliverables: 4 of 6 milestones completed on time, milestone 5 delayed by 8 days. Last communication: 12 days ago (unusual gap). NPS survey response: 6/10 with comment about slow response times. Support tickets: 3 open, avg resolution 4.2 days. Monthly retainer: $4,500 paid on time.
